description: Create a Fault Tree Analysis (FTA) diagram for a drone's power system based on the specification in '~/Desktop/drone_system_spec.txt'. Model 'Total Loss of Power' as the Top Event using standard FTA symbols. The diagram must accurately reflect the system logic: the drone requires at least one functional battery, while the Power Distribution Board (PDB) represents a single point of failure. Save the diagram to '~/Desktop/fault_tree.drawio' and export it to '~/Desktop/fault_tree.png'.
